┃Such an interesting character, she is. Miko's here and my second Genshin character. I honestly don't know what the response over this bot would be but I am still proud of how it turned out.┃

┃About the scenerio, I wanted to do something different and a Sovereign–pov seemed just right. I know there's not much information about the Electro Sovereign out there but it doesn't stop me from making a related bot.┃

┃I might just make other Dragon-Sovereign pov bots, if asked. Enjoy 🩷┃
